_comment: Example access-control / IDOR spec for AccessScannerMain. Copy to a gitignored *.local.json, fill in REAL captured sessions (never commit them), and point the cases at endpoints you are authorized to test. Confirmed when a request as `identity` returns 2xx containing `mustContain` (data that should be restricted). identity: null = unauthenticated. These cases target the local scripts/vuln-target.py.

cases.name: Missing auth: admin panel without a session
